title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 87.055 - Law applicable to whom
text:
87.055.  Law applicable to whom. — Sections 87.010 to 87.105 shall apply to all persons who are now or shall hereafter become members of any organized fire department in any city, village or incorporated town in this state, and to all cities, villages and incorporated towns now existing in this state or which may hereafter be created herein.
(RSMo 1939 § 9510) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 8943; 1919 § 9044; 1909 § 9869
